PLATFORM FEATURES

Next-generation simulation technology

🎮

Scroll-to-Simulate

Control your robot frame-by-frame with intuitive scroll mechanics. 192 unique frames of animation.

🌐

Multi-Environment

Test across Mars, Deep Sea, and smart factory environments with real-time performance telemetry.

💡

Smart Advisor

AI-powered component recommendation engine that optimizes your build for any budget.

⚡

Anti-Gravity UI

Physics-based floating elements that respond to your scroll velocity for an immersive experience.

ROBOSIM

Smart Robot Simulator & Architect Platform. Design, simulate, and build your next robot.
